Why Paige's?

Not Your Average Bagel

🫗

5 Simple Ingredients

Sourdough starter, bread flour, water, sugar, salt. That's it. No preservatives, no shortcuts.

⏳

48-Hour Ferment

Slow fermentation means easier digestion, better flavor, and a chewier crust you can actually taste.

🔥

Boiled & Baked Fresh

Every single batch is hand-shaped, kettle-boiled, and baked to golden perfection. Never frozen.

The Difference

Real Sourdough,
Real Ingredients

Most "sourdough" bagels use commercial yeast with a splash of starter for flavor. Ours are naturally leavened — no yeast, no additives, no compromises. Just time, flour, water, and a starter that's been fed daily since day one.

Read Our Story
Meet the Baker

Hey, I'm Paige.

"I started baking sourdough because I wanted bagels I could actually eat. Now I can't stop making them — and I want you to try them."
